source_name: UN OCHA Humanitarian Situation Report | 3 July 2026
citation_text: OCHA's 3 July 2026 Humanitarian Situation Report documents Gaza and West Bank casualty and displacement developments and cites MoH figures.

source_name: UN OCHA Reported Impact Snapshot | Gaza Strip (8 July 2026)
citation_text: OCHA's reported impact snapshot provides casualty and impact figures for the Gaza Strip and notes that some figures are yet to be verified by the UN.
UNRWA provides operational updates and humanitarian reporting relevant to Gaza and refugee response.
OHCHR reports on human rights conditions and incidents in the occupied Palestinian territory.
ACLED provides structured conflict event data that can support corroboration around incident timelines.
